title: TFC Cold Sweat
description: Integrates TFC with the popular temperature mod Cold Sweat
body:
# Cold Sweat TFC
Cold Sweat TFC integrates Cold Sweat with TFC.
Includes recipes, block heats, ambient temperature and even insulator items and item temperatures!

### Features 
- TFC's own temperature system as the world temperature for Cold Sweat.
- Cloths as insulator materials.
- Recipes tweaked to be obtainable in TFC.
- Full block temperature compatibility. (Supports **Firmalife** and **TFC Cast Iron Grill**.)
- Item Heats affecting player temperature.
- Compatibility for several popular addons.

### Credits
- Cold Sweat, for the reference code, logo and help!
- ColdSweat TFC for reference code.
